diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,157 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports Hono class, Context, types, and helper types
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Input, Schema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: main entry point re-exporting core classes and types from other modules
+- Copy-safe detail: re-exports 11+ items from ./hono and ./types and ./client modules
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: defines Env, Input, Handler, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HTTPResponseError
+- Internal names noticed: RouterRoute, HandlerResponse, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: comprehensive type definitions for routes, handlers, environments, and schema
+- Copy-safe detail: defines 100+ type aliases and interfaces including HandlerInterface and MiddlewareHandlerInterface
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: main Hono app class with options for router selection
+- Copy-safe detail: extends HonoBase, instantiates SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter as fallbacks
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, request, fire
+- Internal names noticed: compose, Context, Router, HonoOptions, Env, H, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandler, NotFoundHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: base implementation with method route handlers and request dispatch logic
+- Copy-safe detail: defines router, errorHandler, notFoundHandler, routes array, paths for each HTTP method
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, env, error, event, executionCtx, res, set, get, var, header, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, Env, Input, NotFoundHandler, RouterRoute, TypedResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: request context with state for vars, headers, and response object
+- Copy-safe detail: stores execution context, route match result, prepared headers, layout and renderer, status, error, finalized flag
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Result, ValidationTargets, Body
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: parses request URL, method, query params, path params, and body
+- Copy-safe detail: caches body parsing as text/json/arrayBuffer/blob/bytes, handles decoded params, matches router routes
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: Symbol
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: exports a unique symbol for match result access
+- Copy-safe detail: single symbol export
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function
+- Internal names noticed: BodyData, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: parses POST body content for json, form-data, and url-encoded inputs
+- Copy-safe detail: handles dot notation nesting and all:true flag for multi-value fields
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose
+- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: middleware composition engine similar to koa-compose
+- Copy-safe detail: dispatches middleware array linearly, captures error or not-found handlers mid-stack, sets context.res on completion
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode, Response
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: throws structured HTTP errors with custom response options
+- Copy-safe detail: stores status code and response, provides getResponse() method
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: hc client builder, parseResponse wrapper for fetch
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils/fetch-result-please, ./client/types, ./client/utils
+- Plain-English summary: exports HTTP client and response parsing utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: re-exports hc function, parseResponse and DetailedError classes
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl, BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, Client
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils (buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, etc)
+- Plain-English summary: proxy-based HTTP client builder with method chaining
+- Copy-safe detail: creates proxy around callback, builds URL with params/headers, supports JSON/form/query/body
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, Client, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType
+- Internal names noticed: MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, Endpoint, ExpandAllMethod, BuildPath, BuildSearch
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: type definitions for client-side HTTP routing and request/response inference
+- Copy-safe detail: 30+ generic types for method expansion, URL building, request/response type inference
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, DetailedError with statusCode/detail/log fields
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: smart response parser t
